title: Google Calendar + Google Tasks Integration

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone ,

If you’re using Google Workspace, we’re excited to share a big update: Google Calendar & Google Tasks now syncs directly to monday boards.

We built this solution to bridge common workflow gaps. With it, you can:

  • Manage both tasks & events in one place (at the board level)
  • Flexibly customize sync direction & fields to fit your workflow
  • Choose any calendar or task list to sync as needed

The app is now available on the marketplace, and we’re offering free access for teams under 10 seats so you can try it right away.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @zoe.sgt sounds exciting - does this work on subitems along with main items?

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Clarey At the moment the app only supports main item-level.

However, subitem syncing support is already on our development roadmap and we’ll share updates soon.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Zoe, Fab watching this space
